channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Virginia Supreme Court strikes down Democrats’ redrawn US House maps, giving Republicans a win
item.description: The Virginia Supreme Court has struck down a Democratic congressional redistricting plan that had won voter approval.

item.title: What to know about the latest wave of changes to congressional districts
Alabama lawmakers pass plan for new US House primary if courts allow different districts
